system.Text:
When you __traverse an area within a perilous site__, envision your surroundings. Then, consider your approach. If you navigate this area...

  * With reckless haste or rapid manuevering: Roll +edge.
  * With canny stealth or disguised deception: Roll +shadow.
  * With cautious observation or detailed navigation: Roll +wits.

On a __strong hit__, you reach the next area. Mark progress and @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.4da87fd54eaa1b89]{Find an Opportunity}.

On a __weak hit__, roll on the following table according to your stat.

On a __miss__, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.06f78b87b9532437]{Reveal a Danger}.

{{table_columns>move:delve/delve/delve_the_depths}}

With cautious observation or detailed navigation

Weak Hit.Text:
On a __weak hit__, roll on the following table according to your stat.

{{table_columns>move:delve/delve/delve_the_depths}}
